arts.sum: Liverpool travel to RB Leipzig on Wednesday night aiming to continue their perfect start in this season’s Champions League campaign. Arne Slot’s side are targeting a third consecutive win in the league phase, having navigated the challenges of AC Milan and Bologna to date.
